details.reasoning: Nearly perfect implementation that meets all core requirements with excellent code quality. CLI variant (Stats/StatsArgs with human flag), function signature (pub(crate), returns ExitStatus::Success), --human flag support, per-bucket and total output lines, module registration, and dispatch wiring are all correctly implemented. Pattern consistency with cache_size command is maintained. Bonus features include proper preview feature integration, comprehensive tests with filtering utilities, and clear documentation. Minor deviation: uses ALL_BUCKETS constant instead of CacheBucket::iter() (which excludes Python bucket), but this is actually a superior design choice for stats command with clear justification in the code. Explicitly iterates over buckets and computes sizes correctly with DiskUsage.
